settings.auth_file.label: Auth file
settings.auth_file.description: Path to the Codex auth JSON file. The default reads ~/.codex/auth.json.
settings.endpoint.label: Usage endpoint
settings.endpoint.description: ChatGPT backend endpoint used to query Codex usage.
settings.request_delay_seconds.label: Request delay seconds
settings.request_delay_seconds.descripti: Seconds to wait after each completed usage request before starting the next one.
settings.show_account.label: Show account
settings.show_account.description: Show the account email in the widget tooltip.
settings.gauge_char.description: One character used for this gauge level. Use custom font glyphs here if desired.
